meta.title: Websites and servers for small businesses | {brand}
meta.description: I build your website, move your server or audit your infrastructure. Published prices, delivery in 1 to 7 days. If you don't like the result, you don't pay.
meta.ogAlt: {brand}: websites and servers for small businesses, published prices, money-back guarantee.
meta.keywords: small business web design, server migration, infrastructure security audit, website maintenance, self-hosted alternative, fixed price website

hero.eyebrow: Based in Madrid. Working remotely across Spain and the EU.
hero.h1Lead: Websites and servers for small businesses.
hero.h1Accent: If you don't like it, you don't pay.
hero.sub: I build your website, move your server or review your infrastructure. You see the price before I start. I deliver in 1 to 7 days.
trust: You pay after you approve the work

quote.title: Work out your price
quote.intro: Pick the job and the extras. The total updates as you choose.
quote.variableNote: Priced per case. Tell me the situation and I give you the number before I touch anything.
quote.messageIntro: Hi Kamil, here is what I want:

services.title: Four jobs, prices in the open
services.sub: Every price below is what you pay. If your case falls outside this, I give you the number before I start.

web.name: New website
web.pitch: A site that loads fast, reads well on a phone and doesn't break on its own.
includes: Several pages, designed around your business
Works on phone, tablet and desktop
Copy and structure aimed at getting you called
Legal notice and privacy policy ready to publish

growth.name: Getting found
growth.detail: User journey, SEO, SEM, visibility inside AI search, and a results report.

commerce.name: Payments and shipping
commerce.detail: Card and PayPal, shipping zones by country, and order statistics.

server.name: Your own server
server.detail: I set up Nginx or Apache, virtual hosts and certificates on your machine.

migration.name: Migration
migration.pitch: I move your site or your application to another server without your customers noticing.
includes: Full backup before anything gets touched
Cutover window scheduled outside your working hours
Rollback ready in case something fails

cloud_exit.name: Cloud exit
cloud_exit.detail: You leave a cloud provider for your own VPS. I show you the monthly bill before and after.

audit.name: Audit
audit.pitch: I look at your server from outside and inside, then tell you where people get in.
includes: What your server exposes to the internet right now
Findings ranked by severity, not a dump of 300 warnings
A script that fixes what can be fixed automatically
Report in plain language, no jargon

recheck.name: Follow-up check
recheck.detail: I audit again later at the returning client rate.

subkill.name: Kill a subscription
subkill.pitch: Tell me which SaaS you pay every month. If a self-hosted alternative exists, I set it up and you keep it.
includes: First we check whether your case fits. If it doesn't, I say so and charge nothing
I charge what you pay in 3 months of that subscription
Your data moves to your server, not mine
I stay away from invoicing and anything with a legal obligation attached
subkill.priceModel: 3 months of what you pay now

process.title: Four steps, no hour-long meetings
process.sub: The order matters: I don't start until we both know the price and the date.

steps.name: You tell me the problem
steps.detail: Fill in the form or message me on WhatsApp. I need two things: what bothers you, and when you need it.

steps.name: I send scope and price
steps.detail: You get a one-page PDF with what I do, what I don't do, the date and the number. If something looks wrong, we fix it there.

steps.name: I build it
steps.detail: Between 1 and 7 days depending on the job. I show you progress through whichever channel you pick.

steps.name: You review it and pay
steps.detail: Take your time looking. If it works for you, pay by bank transfer or Bizum. If it doesn't, you pay nothing and no invoice exists.

process.scopeNote: This is the document you get at step 2. Read it before you write to me.

guarantee.title: If you don't like the result, you don't pay
guarantee.body: No small print and no argument. You review the delivered work, and if it doesn't serve you, tell me and we close it there. No deposit, no payment up front, no penalty for walking away.

points.name: Nothing up front
points.detail: I ask for no deposit to start.

points.name: The code is yours
points.detail: Site, configuration and domain sit in your name from day one.

points.name: No lock-in
points.detail: Cancel maintenance whenever you want, no notice period.

launch.title: The first {slots} clients pay nothing
launch.body: I am starting on my own and I need real work to show. I do the whole job and charge you nothing. In exchange I ask for two things: unfiltered feedback on what went wrong, and permission to name you as a reference if the result convinces you.
launch.note: Applies to the services above with the same scope and the same guarantee.

about.title: Kamil El Kouarti
about.lead: I administer production Linux systems Monday to Friday. I build this at the weekend.
body: I work as a systems technician on an Amazon production line with CEVA Logistics, where I keep around {workstationsManaged} Linux stations running. When a station dies, that section of the floor stops, so the job is to fix fast and document it so it doesn't happen twice.
Before that I built the VPN infrastructure for {vpnClientNetworks} small business networks: custom panel, WireGuard and OpenVPN dual stack, and automated client onboarding on Linux and Windows.
I have no client portfolio yet. That is why I publish prices, take no money up front and give the first jobs away. I would rather you judged the work than the story.
about.credsNote: Each one links to its official credential.

stats.label: Linux stations I keep running in production
minutes per station after automating the rollout

faq.title: What people ask before hiring me

items.q: What happens if I don't like the result?
items.a: You don't pay. You review the delivered work and if it doesn't serve you, you tell me. I issue no invoice, claim nothing, and you keep whatever already sits in your name.
Between 1 and 7 days. A simple site lands in 1 or 2. A migration with mail and certificates runs to 5 or 7. The exact date goes in the scope document before I start.
Outside this website. Bank transfer or Bizum once the work is delivered and you have approved it. This page takes no payments and stores no banking data.

items.q: Do you ask for a deposit?
items.a: No. I start with nothing up front. I carry the risk that you won't like it.
Yes. The domain registers in your name, the code gets handed to you and the hosting sits in your account. If you want a different supplier tomorrow, you take everything without asking me.

items.q: What do you need from me to start?
items.a: The text you want to show, your logo if you have one, and access to the domain if you already bought it. If you have none of that, I write a first draft and you correct it.
I work remotely across Spain. In Madrid I can come in person when the job needs it, for example touching a server that isn't exposed to the internet.

items.q: I already have a website and I don't want to change it
items.a: Then migration or an audit is what you want. I can move your current site to a cheaper server or review where it sits exposed, without redoing the design.
Yes, with full tax details, and always after you approve the work.

items.q: What do you do with my data?
items.a: I keep your name and your contact so I can reply, nothing else. I sell no data, run no advertising and set no tracking. The privacy policy spells it out.

contact.title: Tell me what is breaking
contact.sub: Three fields. I reply within {hours} hours, Monday to Sunday.

need.label: What you need
need.placeholder: Example: my site takes 9 seconds to load and I am losing calls.

contact.consent: I have read the privacy policy and agree to you using my details to reply.

success.title: Message received
success.body: I reply within {hours} hours to the contact you left. If you are in a hurry, message me on WhatsApp and we sort it now.

errors.name: Write your name.
errors.need: Tell me in one sentence what you need.
errors.contact: Leave an email or a phone number so I can reply.
errors.contactFormat: That doesn't look like an email or a phone number.
errors.consent: I need your permission to use the contact details you give me.
errors.network: The form didn't send. Message me on WhatsApp or by email and we sort it out.
errors.tooFast: Wait a second and send again.

footer.tagline: Websites, servers and automation for businesses of 1 to 100 people.
footer.builtNote: This page uses no tracking cookies, no analytics and no external fonts.

legalNotice.title: Legal notice
legalNotice.pendingBanner: This legal notice is pending completion with the owner's tax details. The marked fields get filled in once self-employed registration finishes.

p: Owner: {legalName}
Tax ID: {taxId}
Address: {registeredAddress}
Contact email: {email}
Website: {baseUrl}
This site describes the web development, server migration, infrastructure audit and automation services the owner provides. Browsing the site makes you a user and means you accept these terms.
You may read and download the content of this site for your own use. You may not reproduce it commercially without the owner's written permission.
The owner accepts no liability for damage arising from use of the site other than as intended.
Published prices exclude VAT and serve as a reference. The firm price, the scope and the delivery date get fixed in the scope document you receive before work starts.
This site processes no payments. Payment happens off the website by bank transfer or Bizum, once the work is delivered and approved.

If the delivered work does not satisfy you, you do not pay and no invoice gets issued. This guarantee covers the scope agreed in writing. It does not cover work already approved and invoiced, nor third-party costs you contracted in your own name, such as domains or hosting.
The code, text and designs delivered to you become yours once the work is paid for. Third-party components keep their original licence.
Trademarks and logos on this site belong to their respective owners.
This site is hosted by {hostingProvider}.
These terms fall under Spanish law. For any dispute, the parties submit to the courts of the consumer's domicile where the consumer qualifies as such.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: This page explains what data I collect, what I use it for and how you get it deleted. Written to be understood, not to cover my back.
summary: I only collect what you type into the contact form.
I use it to reply to you and for nothing else.
No tracking cookies, no analytics, no third-party fonts.
Ask me to delete it and I delete it.

p: Controller: {legalName}
Tax ID: {taxId}
Contact: {email}
From the contact form: the name you type, the description of what you need, the email or phone you leave, and the channel you prefer for a reply.
I collect no browsing data. This site installs no analytics or advertising cookies, loads no third-party fonts or scripts, and uses no tracking pixels.
The server hosting the page may record your IP address in its technical logs, which happens on any web server and serves the security of the service.

sections.h: What I use it for and on what legal basis
p: I use your data to answer your enquiry and, if you hire me, to run the job and issue the invoice.
The legal basis is your consent when you tick the box on the form, and performance of a contract once we start working together. Invoicing records get kept because the law requires it.
If we never end up working together, I delete your enquiry after {retention} months.
If you hire me, I keep the invoicing data for the periods Spanish tax law requires.

The form gets processed by {processorName}, with servers in {processorCountry}. That provider receives the form content in order to pass it to me by email. You can read their policy on their own site.
Hosting is handled by {hostingProvider}.
I sell your data to nobody and share it with nobody else. There are no advertisers.

sections.h: If you would rather skip the form
p: Write to {email} or message me on WhatsApp. That way your data never passes through the form provider.
You can ask me for access to your data, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, portability, and you can object to processing. Write to {email} and I answer within one month.
If you believe I have not complied, you can complain to the {authority}.

This site sets no cookies. It stores one technical value in your browser: the language you pick, so it stops asking. That value never leaves your device, identifies nobody, and you clear it by clearing site data in your browser.
That is why you see no cookie banner: there is nothing to consent to.

scopeDoc.subtitle: Template of the document you receive before work starts
scopeDoc.intro: This is the document I send at step 2. One page, no jargon, no annexes. We sign it by email and I start.

p: A closed list of deliverables, one per line. If something is not on this list, it is not included.
An explicit list of what falls outside. It prevents arguments at the end and protects your budget.
Text, images, logo and access credentials, with a deadline. The delivery clock starts when I receive all of it.
A specific date, between 1 and 7 calendar days from the moment I receive your material.
A fixed number, excluding VAT. Any change of scope gets quoted separately and in writing before it gets built.
Two rounds of corrections included on the agreed scope, within 14 days of delivery.

If the delivered work does not satisfy you, you do not pay and I issue no invoice. Third-party costs contracted in your name, such as the domain or the hosting, fall outside this guarantee because that money never passes through me.
Bank transfer or Bizum, within 7 days of you approving the work. No deposit beforehand.
The code, the text and the configuration belong to you. The domain and the hosting register in your name from day one.
I process only the data the job requires, following the privacy policy published at {baseUrl}.

scopeDoc.footerNote: Template for information. The final document will carry your details, the specific scope and the date.

notFound.title: This page does not exist
notFound.body: The link you followed leads nowhere. Go back to the start or write to me and I tell you where to find what you wanted.
